queries.question: Show me the sous chef who cooks pizza?
queries.sql:
Select 
c.Full_name
FROM Sous_chef C 
JOIN Restaurant R ON c.Sous_id = r.Sous_chef_id
JOIN Orders O ON R.restaurant_id = O.restaurant_id
JOIN Order_details OD ON O.order_id = OD.order_id
JOIN Menu_items m ON OD.menu_item_id = m.menu_item_id
WHERE  m.item_name = 'Pizza'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?c a :Sous_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasSous_chef ?c .
  ?o a :Orders .
  ?o p:hasRestaurant ?r .
  ?od a :Order_details .
  ?od p:hasOrders ?o .
  ?m a :MenuItems .
  ?od p:hasMenu_items ?m .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?m p:item_name ?item_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?item_name_f) = "Pizza")
}

queries.question: Show me the executive and sous chefs who cook pizza?
queries.sql:
Select 
c.Full_name, C.full_name 
FROM Executive_chef C 
JOIN Restaurant R ON c.chef_id = r.executive_chef_id
JOIN Orders O ON R.restaurant_id = O.restaurant_id
JOIN Order_details OD ON O.order_id = OD.order_id
JOIN Menu_items m ON OD.menu_item_id = m.menu_item_id
 JOIN Sous_chef SC ON SC.Sous_id = r.Sous_chef_id WHERE  m.item_name = 'Pizza'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?full_name2 WHERE {
  ?c a :Executive_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasExecutive_chef ?c .
  ?o a :Orders .
  ?o p:hasRestaurant ?r .
  ?od a :Order_details .
  ?od p:hasOrders ?o .
  ?m a :MenuItems .
  ?od p:hasMenu_items ?m .
  ?sc a :Sous_chef .
  ?r p:hasSous_chef ?sc .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?c p:name ?full_name2 .
  ?m p:item_name ?item_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?item_name_f) = "Pizza")
}

queries.question: Please list all the chefs in alphabetical order by their name
queries.sql:
SELECT c.Full_name 
FROM Executive_chef C ORDER BY Full_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?c a :Executive_chef .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?c p:name ?full_name_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?full_name_o)

queries.question: Please list all the chefs in alphabetical order by their name
queries.sql:
SELECT c.Full_name
FROM Sous_chef C ORDER BY Full_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?c a :Sous_chef .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?c p:name ?full_name_o .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?full_name_o)

queries.question: Please list all the chefs in alphabetical order by their name
queries.sql:
SELECT c.Full_name, C.full_name 
FROM Executive_chef C JOIN Restaurant R ON c.chef_id = r.executive_chef_id JOIN Sous_chef SC ON SC.Sous_id = r.Sous_chef_id ORDER BY C.Full_name, SC.Full_name
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name ?full_name2 WHERE {
  ?c a :Executive_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasExecutive_chef ?c .
  ?sc a :Sous_chef .
  ?r p:hasSous_chef ?sc .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?c p:name ?full_name2 .
  ?c p:name ?full_name_o .
  ?sc p:name ?full_name_o2 .
}
ORDER BY ASC(?full_name_o) ASC(?full_name_o2)

queries.question: Show me any chef who cooks pizza
queries.sql:
Select 
c.Full_name
FROM Executive_chef C 
JOIN Restaurant R ON c.chef_id = r.executive_chef_id
JOIN Orders O ON R.restaurant_id = O.restaurant_id
JOIN Order_details OD ON O.order_id = OD.order_id
JOIN Menu_items m ON OD.menu_item_id = m.menu_item_id
WHERE  m.item_name = 'Pizza'
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?c a :Executive_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasExecutive_chef ?c .
  ?o a :Orders .
  ?o p:hasRestaurant ?r .
  ?od a :Order_details .
  ?od p:hasOrders ?o .
  ?m a :MenuItems .
  ?od p:hasMenu_items ?m .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?m p:item_name ?item_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?item_name_f) = "Pizza")
}

ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:

PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/hospitality/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE vague {
  component: { SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?c a :Sous_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasSous_chef ?c .
  ?o a :Orders .
  ?o p:hasRestaurant ?r .
  ?od a :Order_details .
  ?od p:hasOrders ?o .
  ?m a :MenuItems .
  ?od p:hasMenu_items ?m .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?m p:item_name ?item_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?item_name_f) = "Pizza")
} }
  full: { SELECT ?full_name ?full_name2 WHERE {
  ?c a :Executive_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasExecutive_chef ?c .
  ?o a :Orders .
  ?o p:hasRestaurant ?r .
  ?od a :Order_details .
  ?od p:hasOrders ?o .
  ?m a :MenuItems .
  ?od p:hasMenu_items ?m .
  ?sc a :Sous_chef .
  ?r p:hasSous_chef ?sc .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?c p:name ?full_name2 .
  ?m p:item_name ?item_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?item_name_f) = "Pizza")
} }
  component_2: { SELECT ?full_name WHERE {
  ?c a :Executive_chef .
  ?r a :Restaurants .
  ?r p:hasExecutive_chef ?c .
  ?o a :Orders .
  ?o p:hasRestaurant ?r .
  ?od a :Order_details .
  ?od p:hasOrders ?o .
  ?m a :MenuItems .
  ?od p:hasMenu_items ?m .
  ?c p:name ?full_name .
  ?m p:item_name ?item_name_f .
  FILTER(STR(?item_name_f) = "Pizza")
} }
}
